cleanroom_implementation_rule: Define `struct is_same` with `value = false/true` across all standards
Define SFINAE template `struct enable_if` across all standards
Define `template<bool C, class T> using enable_if_t = typename enable_if<C,T>::type` across all standards
Define `template<class T, class U> constexpr bool is_same_v = is_same<T,U>::value` starting in `metal2.0+`
Define variadic trait logical AND `struct conjunction` starting in `metal2.0+`
Define variadic trait logical OR `struct disjunction` starting in `metal2.0+`
Define logical NOT `struct negation` starting in `metal2.0+`
Define `template<typename... Args> using void_t = void` in Clean-Room `metal_type_traits.metal` for full C++ metaprogramming support
Specialized for pointer types across address spaces (`device T*`, `constant T*`, etc.)
Declare unevaluated rvalue reference (`add_rvalue_reference_t<T> declval() noexcept`) for `decltype` SFINAE
Define `struct initializer_list` (`const T* _begin, size_t _size`) mapping to compiler array construction
